command: python3 scripts/docmeta/validate_agent_commands.py --mode strict && python3 scripts/docmeta/validate_agent_handoff.py --mode strict && python3 scripts/docmeta/validate_command_chain.py --chain artifacts/run-phase5/fixtures/chains/p5a-chain.json && python3 scripts/docmeta/validate_command_chain.py --cross-contract-fixtures artifacts/run-phase5/fixtures/cross-contract && python3 scripts/docmeta/validate_command_chain.py --chain artifacts/run-phase5/fixtures/chains/p5c-chain.json && python3 scripts/docmeta/validate_command_chain.py --chain artifacts/run-phase5/fixtures/chains/p5d-chain.json && make validate
provenance_note: Simulation input fixtures are committed under artifacts/run-phase5/fixtures/ for reproducibility. Chain fixtures (P5-A, P5-C, P5-D) are under fixtures/chains/; cross-contract fixture (P5-B) is under fixtures/cross-contract/. The execution.txt is a curated transcript of the validator runs, not raw stdout capture. Validator outputs were observed and transcribed during the agent session; exact CLI output is reconstructed from session memory.

P5-B.description: write_change whitespace-only diff; handoff scope claims major implementation

P5-C.description: validate_change success:true with semantically unrelated checks

P5-D.description: complete chain with no exact_before/exact_after for modify (no operative change proof)
